name: @firegrid/store
description: Fable-native S2-backed durable store adapters for Firegrid.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Store.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/store diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/store lint is covered by F# compile'
